---
name: 📝 Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest changes or additions to the project documentation
title: '[Docs] <short description>'
labels: documentation
assignees: 'deinfreu'
---

## Docs Gap
What is missing, unclear, or incorrect in the current documentation?

## Proposed Changes
Describe what you would like to see changed or added.

## Related Files
Link to existing docs or pages that need updating (e.g., `docs/installation/docker.md`).

## Additional Context
Any screenshots, examples, or references that help clarify your suggestion.
